messages.subject: [R-meta] MAIVE (Meta-Analysis Instrumental Variable Estimator)

messages.subject: [R-meta] Network meta-analysis using HRs
messages.body_plain:
Dear all,

We are planning to conduct a network meta-analysis using hazard ratios? Is it possible to run the analysis using the package netmeta?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

Ioannis Avgerinos

Post-doc Fellow,
Clinical Research and Evidence-based Medicine Unit
Aristotle University of Thessaloniki, Greece
messages.body_snippet:
Dear all,

We are planning to conduct a network meta-analysis using hazard ratios? Is it possible to run the analysis using the package netmeta?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

Ioannis Avgerino
